2606.10875.title: Pushing the Limits of LLM Tool Calling via Experiential Knowledge Integration and Activation
2606.10875.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) rely on tool use to act as autonomous agents, yet often fail in multi-step execution due to insufficient tool-related knowledge and ineffective knowledge activation. Therefore, we present a systematic study on how knowledge influences tool-use performance, covering the stages of knowledge acquisition, activation, and internalization. In the knowledge acquisition stage, we acquire and evaluate various forms of experiential knowledge, and our analysis shows that simple instance-level knowledge can already provide strong and reliable gains, while abstract intent-level knowledge offers limited benefits. At inference time, to activate knowledge, we find that prompting LLM to expand the depth of reasoning yields diminishing returns, whereas expanding the width of reasoning by parallel sampling with aggregation more effectively activates latent experiential knowledge. At training time, for knowledge internalization, post-training with knowledge-augmented data further improves performance, with reinforcement learning outperforming supervised fine-tuning. Based on these insights, we propose the Knowledge-Augmented Tool Execution (KATE), a knowledge-augmented tool execution framework that integrates experiential knowledge with reasoning-width-expanded inference and knowledge-aware training. Experiments on BFCL-V3 and AppWorld demonstrate consistent and substantial improvements over strong baselines across model scales. Our Code is available at https://github.com/hypasd-art/KATE.
2606.10875.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）依賴工具使用來作為自主代理，但由於工具相關知識不足和知識激活不有效，常常在多步執行中失敗。<lb/>因此，我們提出了一項系統性研究，探討知識如何影響工具使用表現，涵蓋知識獲取、激活和內化的階段。<lb/>在知識獲取階段，我們獲取並評估各種形式的經驗知識，我們的分析顯示，簡單的實例級知識已經能提供強大且可靠的增益，而抽象的意圖級知識則提供有限的好處。<lb/>在推理時，為了激活知識，我們發現提示LLM擴展推理的深度會產生遞減的回報，而通過平行取樣和聚合擴展推理的寬度則更有效地激活潛在的經驗知識。<lb/>在訓練時，為了知識內化，使用增強知識的數據進行後訓練進一步提高了性能，強化學習的表現超過了監督微調。<lb/>基於這些見解，我們提出了知識增強工具執行（KATE），這是一個將經驗知識與推理寬度擴展的推理和知識感知訓練相結合的知識增強工具執行框架。<lb/>在BFCL-V3和AppWorld上的實驗顯示，在各模型規模上，相較於強基線有一致且顯著的改進。<lb/>我們的代碼可在 https://github.com/hypasd-art/KATE 獲得。
2606.10875.author: Yupu Hao et.al.
2606.10875.authors: Yupu Hao, Zhuoran Jin, Huanxuan Liao, Kang Liu, Jun Zhao
